title: PlushieVerse
description: A mod that adds lots of plushies.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92d8208e22af4e1fba79b2c28ca3673c636bcca7.png)
PlushieVerse is a mod that adds plushies of a wide variety of themes to Minecraft.

## **DO YOU WANT YOUR OWN PLUSHIE?**

Write me on https://x.com/PlushieVerseMC and I will probably do your character as a plushie. The character must be original and not have copyright. 

Themes:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Minecraft
- Players
- Hostile mobs
- Passive mobs
- Neutral mobs

Original characters
- ONTE
- Reverse
- Fans

Multiverse
- Don Quixote of La Mancha

</details>


You can craft every plushie in a Plushie loom with shears, a Template Plushie and another item (depending on which plushie are you crafting).

Every plushie have its unique advancement.

The mod have 2 languages: English (US) and Spanish (Spain).
